goal: Pause ablation and mine Blindspot Atlas failure classes with tiny solo-first discovery scouts before freezing new HoloVerify benchmark packets.

position.blind_120_interpretation: Clean runtime/firewall proof, not a strong seam proof.
position.current_priority: Find packets where solo models actually break before spending Holo or ablation budget.
position.discovery_status: Discovery packets may be generated and screened before freeze, but cannot be counted publicly until rebuilt/frozen under blind protocol.

prior_evidence.finding: Cleanest seam was HV-KITC-047-A: expected ALLOW, solo returned ESCALATE after over-weighting a general warning despite exact exception evidence.
20 one-shot mini solo failure candidates from prior three-mini seam scout.
Observed solo misses were mostly false positives on ALLOW packets; blind-120 did not produce enough solo collapse for the desired comparison story.

success_thresholds.strong_seam: At least two of three solo models fail one sibling cleanly.
success_thresholds.usable_seam: At least one of three solo models fails with clean wrong verdict or clean parse/admissibility failure.
success_thresholds.reject: All three solos are KNEW/admissible on both siblings unless kept as a guardrail control.

hologuild_role.not_allowed: No proof credit and no public benchmark credit from discovery generation alone.

stop_rules: Do not run ablation in this lane.
Do not run full Holo before solo scout finds biting seams.
Do not update public claims from discovery packets.
Do not count unfreezed discovery results as benchmark results.
Do not allow Holo or Gov to determine the answer key.
